chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-556 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, For hearing of main case. 16.11.2021 M/s.Ali Madad Arijo & Wakeel Ali Shaikh, Advocate(s) for petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G. Mr. Riaz Hussain Dero, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Kalhoro, Asstt.P.G for the State = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for quashment of FIR Crime No.63/2021, u/s.353,506/2,503,147,148,149 PPC of P.S Radhan, for the reason that it has been lodged by the private respondent against him malafidely. As per report furnished by SHO, P.S Radhan, the charge sheet in above said FIR has already been submitted before the Court having jurisdiction. The cognizance of the case as per learned A.A.G and learned counsel for the private respondent has already been taken up by the Court having jurisdiction. After submission of the charge sheet and its cognizance by the Court having jurisdiction, the FIR could not be quashed by this Court legally. The petitioner, however, may join the trial and seek his premature acquittal in accordance with law by making such application before learned trial Court. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed. J JUDGE
